deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd

deals.next: Deliver gift basket, rug, and trolley to Joyce. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel and Chelsey Bongiovi. Confirm commission received.

Cleared, funded, and closed.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Release delivered to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title. Joyce signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (family member of lien holder Fernando Castillo). Willing to work with us.
Contract executed.

deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer from Michael Rodriguez dead — no earnest money, RBFCU stalled. Steve finished clearing. New prospect interested in subdividing or alternate use. Lead with net after close on any offer.

Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer confirmed dead. Drone footage flagged as next content priority.
Current offer dead — option money not received. Steve still clearing. More open to overall picture on offers. Lead with net after close.

deals.notes: Priority Bank FSB foreclosure. Matt Toney (HouzzPro/San Antonio Remodeling) selected over T&T at $54,877 vs $61,980. Dumpsters running since Saturday. Chris on-site today to meet Matt Toney and project manager.

logs.m: Chris heading to property to meet Matt Toney and project manager. Dumpsters running since Saturday.

Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry Sadler emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as bank decision-maker.
Shot photos and video. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for quotes.

Express Offers returned $550K — likely off vs CMA. Showing scheduled May 4 at 2pm.
Full market analysis complete. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or price cut with cash to close.
